name: Funnel Building
tagline: End-to-end lead gen funnels built to convert.
description: We design, build, and launch complete sales and lead generation funnels for your clients, from landing page to email automation. Platform-flexible and scoped to your client's stack.

deliverables.title: Funnel Strategy & Mapping
deliverables.description: Audience definition, offer positioning, funnel stage mapping, and conversion goal setting before any build begins.

deliverables.title: Landing Page Design & Build
deliverables.description: High-converting landing pages built and optimized: headline, offer, social proof, and CTA structure done right.

deliverables.title: Thank You & Confirmation Pages
deliverables.description: Post-conversion pages that reinforce the decision, deliver the promise, and set up the next step in the journey.

deliverables.title: Form & CRM Integration
deliverables.description: Lead capture connected to the client's CRM: HubSpot, GoHighLevel, ActiveCampaign, or similar. No leads lost.

deliverables.title: Email Automation
deliverables.description: Triggered welcome sequences and nurture flows that follow up automatically, no manual sending required.

deliverables.title: Tracking & Analytics Setup
deliverables.description: Conversion tracking via Google Tag Manager, Meta Pixel, or GA4. Know exactly where leads come from and where they drop.

deliverables.title: Go-Live & QA Support
deliverables.description: Full end-to-end test before launch. We run leads through the funnel to confirm every step fires correctly.

whyUs.title: Platform-flexible
whyUs.description: We build in GoHighLevel, Webflow, ClickFunnels, Systeme.io, or custom, whatever your client's stack requires. No forcing a tool that doesn't fit.

whyUs.title: Strategy before build
whyUs.description: We scope the offer, the audience, and the conversion goal before writing a line. A funnel built on a clear strategy converts. A funnel built on assumptions doesn't.

whyUs.title: Fast delivery without cutting corners
whyUs.description: Most funnels deliver in 1–3 weeks. We move quickly because we have a repeatable process, not because we skip QA.

faq.question: What platforms do you build funnels in?
faq.answer: GoHighLevel is our preferred stack for agencies because of the white-label capabilities. We also build in ClickFunnels, Webflow, Systeme.io, and custom WordPress. We'll recommend based on what the client already uses.

faq.question: Do you write the funnel copy?
faq.answer: Yes, landing page copy, email sequence copy, and thank-you page messaging are included. You provide the offer details and audience information; we write the words.

faq.question: How long does a funnel build take?
faq.answer: A standard lead-gen funnel typically completes in 1–3 weeks. More complex multi-step funnels with extensive automation may take 3–5 weeks. Timeline is confirmed in the proposal.

faq.question: Can you connect it to the client's existing tools?
faq.answer: Yes. We integrate with most major CRMs, email platforms, and booking tools. If you're unsure about a specific integration, flag it on the discovery call and we'll confirm.
